name: stock-scenario-story
description: Numbers-free, evidence-grounded stock showmanship gated by validated quant-stock-technical results.

interface.shortDescription: Numbers-free stock stories after deterministic scoring.
interface.longDescription: Validate a quant-stock-technical result, hide every upstream number, research company and market context as of the same cutoff, and perform an entertaining evidence-grounded stock story in a flamboyant showman voice.
defaultPrompt: Turn this validated quant result into a numbers-free stock spectacle.
Tell a sourced qualitative stock story without showing any numbers.
Pitch this company like a theatrical market showman, purely for fun.
